allow: Bash(python -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile\('main.py', doraise=True\); py_compile.compile\('services/claude_service.py', doraise=True\); print\('OK'\)")
Bash(start //b cmd //c "cd backend && python -m uvicorn main:app --port 8001")

hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" =~ \.py$ ]]; then python -m py_compile "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1 && echo '✓ Python syntax OK' >&2 || echo '✗ Python syntax error' >&2; fi; exit 0
